---
title: "Blog Posts"
listing:
  id: posts
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  max-description-length: 150
  fields: [title, date, description, categories]
  categories: numbered
toc: false
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    grid:
      margin-width: 0px
      sidebar-width: 0px
---

:::{#posts}
:::
